ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Game score */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player (in meters) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (in kilograms) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the event occurred in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, pass, shot) */,
  "event_time" REAL /* Time the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_location_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the event location */,
  "event_location_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the event location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracking_data" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking data point */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the data was collected from */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the data was collected for */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the player's location */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the player's location */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the player */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration of the player */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered by the player */,
  "time_elapsed" REAL /* Time elapsed since the start of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_data_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_data_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_footage" (
  "footage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video footage */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the footage was collected from */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the footage was collected for */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the footage is associated with */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video footage */,
  "video_format" TEXT /* Format of the video footage (e.g., mp4, avi) */,
  "video_duration" REAL /* Duration of the video footage (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("footage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_footage_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_footage_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_footage_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the analytic was derived from */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the analytic was derived for */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., speed, distance, accuracy) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used to derive the metric (e.g., GPS, video analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, trainer, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic was derived from */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., goals, assists, saves) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the summary belongs to */,
  "summary_text" TEXT /* Text summary of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_summaries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
